name: James Gibbons Huneker
abstract: James Gibbons Huneker (January 31, 1857 – February 9, 1921) was an American art, book, music, and theater critic. A colorful individual and an ambitious writer, he was "an American with a great mission," in the words of his friend, the critic Benjamin De Casseres, and that mission was to educate Americans about the best cultural achievem…

about_quotes.speaker: Bud Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: when I was very young, there was a great critic by the name of James Gibbons Huneker and he wrote all kinds of fantastic books... I remember a line when he first heard ragtime
